pick-issue.template: If $ARGUMENTS equals 'list': use the forklift-issue-picker skill to list all open issues from GitHub ordered by milestone and issue number, present a table, and let the user pick which one to work on — then proceed with that issue. Otherwise (no argument): use the forklift-issue-picker skill to auto-pick the next open issue (lowest milestone + issue number), create a feature branch, and prepare a PR.
pick-issue.description: Pick the next Forklift issue (default) or list open issues (list)

review-pr.template: Use the forklift-review skill to review PR $ARGUMENTS. Run all 4 stages in parallel, post inline comments, and iterate until resolved.
review-pr.description: Review a PR using forklift-review skill (e.g. /review-pr 53)
